# Akash Sharma — Revenue AI Engineer
# Website: https://akashsharma.dev
# Last updated: 2026-06

## Identity

Akash Sharma is a Data Scientist and AI Engineer with 4+ years of full-time experience building
production-grade revenue intelligence ML systems for B2B SaaS GTM (Go-To-Market) revenue teams.

Current role: AI Engineer at Revsure AI (December 2024 – Present)
Prior role: Data Scientist at ADA Asia (April 2022 – December 2024)
Both roles: Same B2B SaaS Revenue Intelligence Platform — continuous product ownership.

Contact: asprox124csplayer@gmail.com
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/akash-sharma-01775b14a/
GitHub: https://github.com/CosmiX-6/

## Primary Positioning

Revenue AI Engineer — builds production ML systems converting messy B2B CRM, campaign, and funnel
data into business decisions: pipeline forecasts, revenue predictions, marketing attribution,
campaign budget reallocation, and customer-facing GTM analytics.

Secondary positioning: Applied ML Engineer, Senior Data Scientist, Forecasting Data Scientist,
Marketing Science Data Scientist, GTM Data Scientist.

## Core Expertise

- Revenue forecasting (EOQ prediction, multi-horizon, daily scoring)
- Marketing mix modeling (MMM/MMX, Hill saturation, adstock, scenario planning)
- Propensity modeling (account, lead, opportunity, push/pull)
- Multi-touch attribution (Markov Chain MTA, Hidden Markov Model MTA)
- Statistical incrementality testing (Chi-squared, Welch t-test, DiD, CausalImpact)
- Feature engineering at 1000+ column scale
- SHAP model explainability
- PySpark distributed computing
- B2B SaaS full funnel: Lead → MQL → SAL → Opportunity → Pipeline → Booking

## Verified Impact

- Booking model MAPE reduced ~52% through forecast category feature engineering
- Data computation time reduced from ~1 day to 3 minutes (>99%) via PySpark optimization
- Modeling pipeline time reduced from 5–6 hours to 1 hour via joblib parallelization
- 26+ production ML systems shipped end-to-end

## Key Projects

### Revenue Forecasting Platform (P01)
End-of-quarter pipeline and booking forecasting system. Production ML predicting revenue outcomes
at daily frequency across 4 quarter horizons. Layers: time-decay adjuster, average-index fallback,
Error Correction Index, monthly forecasting layer, SHAP explainability, configurable multi-model
framework (30+ parameters). Built and evolved 2022–present.

### Marketing Mix Modeling Platform (P02)
Full-stack MMX platform: BayesianRidge on STL-decomposed residuals, Hill Curve Transformer
(L-BFGS-B multi-start), adstock decay, PCA attribution, response curve generation, scenario planning.
Supports spend optimization and budget reallocation recommendations.

### Pipeline Projection Engine (P08)
Central projection system integrating 8+ ML model families into daily CQ/NQ/NQ+1/NQ+2 pipeline
and booking projections. Two-layer architecture: bottom-up propensity aggregation + top-down macro
forecast scaling.

### Multi-Touch Attribution (P18)
Markov Chain MTA (removal-effect attribution) + Hidden Markov Model MTA enriched with firmographic
and campaign metadata. Daily attribution across marketing touchpoints.

### Statistical Incrementality Platform (P20)
Five methods: Conversion Lift (Chi-squared), Pre/Post Analysis (Welch t-test + FPC + Cohen's d),
Difference-in-Differences (OLS), CausalImpact-style counterfactual, Campaign Lift (two-proportion z-test).
All methods include mandatory minimum sample size validation.

## Tech Stack

Python, XGBoost, Ridge Regression, BayesianRidge, scikit-learn, SHAP, STL, SARIMAX, Markov Chain,
Hidden Markov Models, L-BFGS-B, PySpark, Spark SQL, BigQuery, GCP, GCP Dataproc, Parquet,
Apache Airflow, Splink, BERT Embeddings, pandas, NumPy, statsmodels, SciPy, joblib

## Education

- Post Graduate Program in Data Analytics — Imarticus Learning (Jan 2022)
- Bachelor of Information Technology — T.Z.A.S.P. Pragati College (Nov 2020)
- IBM Data Science Professional Certificate — IBM × Coursera (Oct 2021, verified via Credly)
- 11 active IBM × Coursera ML/Data Science credentials
